span.p:
Y < −1.000 m
OR collision detected
(publishes: LOOP_0_WP3_RECOVER
or EXP_END_POINT)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: User resumes → NEXT LOOP\n(index reset to WP1, bypass WP0)\n(publishes: LOOP_N_WP1_GATE)

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Props stopped, battery plugged in
Awaiting arming command

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Ascend to 0.50 m altitude
EKF2 10-sample alignment
Geofence active

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Transit to X≈0.186, Y≈1.200
Reverses approach heading
Drone now facing south

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Arrive at gate entry
Hold position, verify heading
User prompt: "Resume?"

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Acceleration to sweep_speed
Exp. Start-Point marker
Constant-velocity transit
Flight Director active

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Post-collision deceleration
Stabilisation hold
Exp. End-Point marker
Motor surge measurement

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Hold at far position
Battery check
User prompt: "Resume?"
Loop counter incremented

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Auto-triggered on low battery
Or user-commanded exit
Disarm after touchdown

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
MoCap tracking lost
Geofence breached
Spacebar kill-switch

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚡ COLLISION OCCURS HERE
(between WP2→WP3)
Cage contacts column surface.
IMU captures peak accel/gyro.
db_mcap_event_segmenter
uses EXP_START_POINT +
EXP_END_POINT to slice
pass-level .mcap files.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🔁 LOOP BACK (not WP0)
WP4 → WP1 only.
Takeoff never repeated.
Each loop = 1 data pass.
Max loops limited by
battery (≈ 8–12 passes
per full flight).

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🛑 FAILSAFE TRIGGERS
• MoCap loss: auto-land
• Geofence breach: land
• Spacebar: force disarm
• Low battery: land
• Source ID 255 for all
companion kill commands
